title: Typed SQLite write for untrusted text
prompt:
In server-side Garry's Mod Lua, insert untrusted variable text into notes(text) using the current preferred safe SQLite API. Handle a query error explicitly.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: sql.QueryTyped parameter binding plus false/sql.LastError handling
